chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-5265 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.21950/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 4 3. For order on Misc. No.21951/2025 (Exemption) 4. For order on Misc. No.21952/2025 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case 31.10.2025 Mr. Munwar Ali ad advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-5. Learned counsel for the petitioner anticipates that an FIR might have been lodged against the petitioner. In the event, any FIR is lodged against the petitioner, the Investigating Officer shall carry out the investigation impartially, fairly and strictly in accordance with law and while investigating the FIR, no harassment shall be caused to the petitioner by any of the respondents. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
